---
output: github_document
---

<!-- README.md is generated from README.Rmd. Please edit that file -->

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>",
  fig.path = "man/figures/README-",
  out.width = "100%"
)
```

# nifdebug

<!-- badges: start -->
<!-- badges: end -->

nifdebug provides functions to troubleshoot Nonmem Input Format (NIF) data sets
generated with the nif package.

## Installation

You can install the development version of nifdebug like so:

``` r
devtools::install_github("rstrotmann/nifdebug)
```
